calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: DR-10 z_self-in-E3 viability wiring falsifier (self_model_v4:SELF-3)
items.note: Third V4 experiment (diagnostic; PROMOTES NOTHING; claim_ids=[]; unblocks MECH-215/ARC-081). Controlled caller-supplied self-viability probe for the DR-10 lever landed ree-v3 main 3dc9d77 (use_self_viability_weighting; z_self enters E3 viability scoring, built on the DR-13 stateful z_self). DR-12's sibling lever on the same score_trajectory+select() machinery. 3 arms OFF/DIFFERENTIAL/UNIFORM. FALSIFIER: a decisive per-candidate self-viability must flip selection vs OFF (dr10_z_self_viability_changes_selection=PASS); non-vacuity precondition self_viability_range>=floor + penalty>gap else substrate_not_ready_requeue; inert off-ramp dr10_wiring_inert; uniform-inert control. Synthetic no-training probe (~seconds). prefer-cloud. Baseline mint SKIPPED (synthetic trivial forward-pass OFF cell). owner_exq assigned to self_model_v4:SELF-3.
